title: Flower Pot's Entities
description: For new fresh Entities in your Minecraft Worlds!
body:
![Contents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acf38b18b7b15162404636417a5b1094775a3bfc.png)

### This pack contains remade versions of the regular Entities in Minecraft with custom animations and (soon to be added) variants for different biomes! 

I am done with school and so got lots of time to work on this project so I will remake logos and so on when I got more models made!


The following list shows you what creatures are in the pack as of right now! Second list shows you all creatures added per version of the pack :D

<details>
<summary>Currently Added</summary>
  
This list will get remade later on. Thank you for your patience! :D

</details>

<details>
<summary>Uppdate Log</summary>
  
  0.0.3:
  Remade the Zombies animations and some textures.

  0.0.2:
  Plain Sheep
  Plain Cow
  Plain Pig

  0.0.1:
  Plains Zombie
</details>

![Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/822fc2ab631e3b2421a731fe0a73377a33f5401b.png)

This pack requires either Optifine or EMF to work!

If you are using OptiFine make sure you have the following settings on for this pack to work to its fullest!
_Video Settings > Quality... > Random Entities: ON, Custom Entity Models: ON_

Links to Dependenices:
> [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)

> [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features),
> [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

IMPORTANT!!! I will switch completely to EMF later on, if you don't want me to do so I am going to add a discord if this project goes anywhere if you want to protest.
